validate-azure-ad-token.failed-validation-error-message: Unauthorized. A valid Entra ID bearer token is required.

set-variable.name: claim-azp
set-variable.value: @(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("azp", ""))

set-variable.name: claim-appid
set-variable.value: @(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("appid", ""))

set-variable.name: claim-xms_mirid
set-variable.value: @(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("xms_mirid", ""))

set-variable.name: claim-oid
set-variable.value: @(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("oid", ""))

set-variable.name: claim-sub
set-variable.value: @(((Jwt)context.Variables["jwt"]).Claims.GetValueOrDefault("sub", ""))

set-variable.name: caller-id
contract-match
contract-obj
matched-identity
caller-name
priority
caller-monthly-quota
caller-environment
priority-label
requestedModel
model-config
model-tpm
model-ptu-tpm
allowed-models
ptu-capacity
ptu-utilization
ptu-quota-available
ptu-threshold
model-clean
set-variable.value: @(((string)context.Variables["requestedModel"]).Replace(".", "").Replace("-", ""))

set-variable.name: pool-id
set-variable.value: @((string)context.Variables["model-clean"] + "-pool")
